mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.name, h.level, h.address, h.phone, h.intro, h.image, h.province, h.city, h.department_count, h.doctor_count, h.follow_count, h.status FROM t_follow f INNER JOIN t_hospital h ON f.follow_id = h.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.follow_type = 1 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT d.id, d.name AS doctorName, d.title, d.avatar, h.name AS hospitalName, dt.name AS departmentName, dt.id AS departmentId FROM t_follow f INNER JOIN t_doctor d ON f.follow_id = d.id INNER JOIN t_hospital h ON d.hospital_id = h.id INNER JOIN t_department dt ON d.department_id = dt.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.follow_type = 2 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT d.id, d.department_id, d.name, d.description, d.alias, d.location, d.treatment, d.symptoms, d.treatment_period, d.cure_rate, d.examinations, d.follow_count, d.create_time, dept.name AS department_name FROM t_follow f INNER JOIN t_disease d ON f.follow_id = d.id LEFT JOIN t_department dept ON d.department_id = dept.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.follow_type = 3 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
